examples: Worryingly, the plan contains few details on how spending will be cut.
Such a scenario could be worryingly close to the truth.
Most worryingly, farm growth is at a below 2% and a below-normal monsoon has been forecast.
More worryingly, the Commission does not expect Spain to improve greatly over the next two years.
The biggest problem, however, is that the affable Mr Coors has so far been worryingly unconvincing.
